name: Abducted
description:
Will you end up as just another failed project of his?

You are abducted by a large muscular obsessive lumberjack (6'10").
After having drugged you and taking you in, he sets the clock for 90 days. Will you be his first and last success, or just another one of his projects he never could perfect???

Forget "I can fix him" he will "fix" you first.
